nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Montgomery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and northern Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Sainte-Foy-de-Montgomery and Saint-Germain-de-Montgomery (Calvados). In Ireland this surname was present in the medieval period, died out, and was then reintroduced from Scotland in the 17th century. It has been Gaelicized in Ireland as Mac Iomaire and in Scotland as Mac Gumaraid.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Montgomery was born about 1208, in Little Cubley, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Montgomery Lord of Ecton, was 25 and his mother, Maud Matilda de Sutton, was 24. He had at least 1 son with Matilda Sutton. He died in 1264, in Marston Montgomery, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 57.

ko.lifeSummary: William de Montgomery(이)가 대략 1208년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 리틀 쿠블리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Montgomery Lord of Ecton(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud Matilda de Sutton(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Matilda Sutton(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1264년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 마스턴 몽고메리에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Montgomery родился около 1208 г. в местности литл кубли, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Montgomery Lord of Ecton было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud Matilda de Sutton, 24. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Matilda Sutton. Он умер в 1264 г. в местности марстон монтгомири, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 57 лет.
